description: Pod exercising every scan_iac kubernetes rule once: hostNetwork:true (k8s-no-host-namespaces), privileged:true (k8s-no-privileged), runAsUser:0 (k8s-run-as-non-root), a capabilities.add of SYS_ADMIN (k8s-drop-all-capabilities), and a hostPath volume (k8s-no-host-paths). The `drop: [ALL]` above the add MUST NOT be flagged — that is the recommended hardening, not a finding.
